name: Slow Cooker Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 24 Bread slices (22 ounce loaf), cubed and toasted for 15 minutes at 300°F
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet.
2. Add onion and celery; sauté until tender.
3. Stir in mushrooms and parsley.
4. Combine seasonings and sprinkle over bread cubes.
5. Add eggs, bouillon, and onion mixture.
6. Toss thoroughly until well combined.
7. Spoon into slow cooker.
8. Cover and cook on high for 1 hour.
9. Reduce to low and cook for 1 to 2 hours.
